title: nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. crista-galli
intro: Nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. crista-galli, also known as the Crested Kidney Vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney issues and urinary tract problems, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Nephrophyllidium crista-galli subsp. crista-galli include its ability to act as a natural diuretic, helping to reduce blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support urinary health and provide relief from kidney-related issues.
